CustomField.description: Subscription length in years derived from Subscription_Term_Months__c via CASE() over the GVS labels. Default arm returns NULL (not 0) so unmapped values surface as missing data — they propagate to a null TCV__c, which is a visible data-quality signal, rather than silently zeroing revenue. Add a CASE arm when extending the GVS.
CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(Subscription_Term_Months__c), "12 Months", 1, "24 Months", 2, "36 Months", 3, NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Subscription length in years (auto-calculated from the months picklist).
CustomField.label: Subscription Term (Years)
